F9 Rule 6.5(2) substituted (6.4.2022) by The Family Procedure (Amendment) Rules 2022 (S.I. 2022/44) , rules 1(3)(a) , 8(b) (with rule 29 ); S.I. 2022/283 , reg. 2


### F10 ... Respondent to be served E+W


6.6. The application must be served on [ F11 the ] respondent.


Textual Amendments


F10 Word in rule 6.6 heading omitted (6.4.2022) by virtue of The Family Procedure (Amendment) Rules 2022 (S.I. 2022/44) , rules 1(3)(a) , 9(a) (with rule 29 ); S.I. 2022/283 , reg. 2


F11 Word in rule 6.6 substituted (6.4.2022) by The Family Procedure (Amendment) Rules 2022 (S.I. 2022/44) , rules 1(3)(a) , 9(b) (with rule 29 ); S.I. 2022/283 , reg. 2


### [ F12 Time for serving an application by the applicant E+W


6.6A. Where the applicant serves the application, the applicant must complete the step required by the following table in relation to the method of service chosen before 12.00 midnight on the day 28 days after the date of issue of the application.


Textual Amendments


F12 Rules 6.6A , 6.6B inserted (6.4.2022) by The Family Procedure (Amendment) Rules 2022 (S.I. 2022/44) , rules 1(3)(a) , 10 (with rule 29 ); S.I. 2022/283 , reg. 2


### Extension of time for serving the application E+W
